title: El Congreso vuelve a tumbar la senda de déficit pero deja viva la quita de deuda a las CCAA
summary: La Cámara Baja rechaza las pretensiones presupuestarias de Hacienda en el último pleno del curso político, pero admite la tramitación de la condonación a las comunidades y la pasarela al RETA. Leer

title: Las patronales de Valencia y Aragón se unen para presentar alegaciones al  tramo ferroviario Teruel-Sagunto
summary: CEV y CEOE Aragón acuerdan pedir la electrificación y la doble vía en ese tramo del corredor Cantábrico-Mediterráneo. Leer

title: Spain declares national emergency over wildfires in Madrid and Ávila
summary: Spain declared on Thursday night a national emergency in the Madrid region and in the province of Ávila, near the capital, in the wake of several wildfires burning out of control.

title: LATEST: Thousands flee wildfires in southern Europe
summary: Luggage-clad residents and tourists fled a French peninsula by boat and the smell of smoke drifted into parts of Madrid on Friday as wildfires swept through parts of western Europe, triggering states of emergencies and calls for EU help.

title: Eight cooler places to escape the heat in Spain's Andalusia
summary: Summers in Andalusia are by and large suffocating, but there are places in the region where it doesn't generally get as hot - here's one for each Andalusian province.

title: EU breathes sigh of relief over new Trump tariffs
summary: The European Union expressed relief Friday over a new wave of US tariffs imposed by Washington on trading partners, following concerns of possible retaliation to a massive fine Brussels had slapped on US giant Google.

title: Spain's intense summer heatwaves deter tourists from returning
summary: New research has revealed that tourists are 15 percent less likely to return to Spain if they've experienced abnormally hot weather while on vacation.

title: Captain faces trial over Spanish fishing boat disaster off Canada
summary: The captain of a Spanish trawler that sank off Canada in 2022 with 21 deaths will stand trial, as will two executives from the company that operated the vessel, a Spanish court said Thursday.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Friday
summary: Hospitality bosses claim 300,000 jobs at risk due to Spain's new smoking bans, top Spanish YouTubers fined over covert advertising and more news on Friday July 24th.

title: Spain's ex-PM claims €1.3M jewellery stash was gift from foreign state
summary: Former Prime Minister Jose Luis Rodríguez Zapatero, under investigation for corruption, said Thursday that luxury jewellery found by investigators during a search of his office was a gift from a foreign country.

title: Not just the Camino: Eight memorable multi-day hikes in Spain
summary: If you've always wanted to undertake a long-distance hike in Spain, but don't want to do the obvious Camino de Santiago, there are lots of amazing alternatives. Here are eight routes to inspire you, some of them in cooler parts of Spain.
